title: In Her Room
original_title: ひとりぼっちじゃない
overview: Susume is a young dentist who can’t communicate well with people since childhood. One day, he meets and falls in love with a woman named Miyako. She invites him into her lush, forest-like apartment, and he, though awkwardly, gradually becomes closer to her.

trailers.title: ひとりぼっちじゃない - 予告編 ｜In Her Room - Trailer｜第35回東京国際映画祭 35th Tokyo International Film Festival
